function G(G)return X[G-(150378-114708)]end for G,c in ipairs({{498849-498848;332199-331509},{641572+-641571;-376139-(-376329)},{87940+-87749,-54759-(-55449)}})do while return(function(X,g,B,j,o,k,d,S,f,w,l,Z,e,F,I,V,n,O,c,A,C,x,H,t)Z,c,f,C,w,e,S,O,V,F,x,H,n,A,t,l,I=function(X)I[X]=I[X]-(488392+-488391)if 348652-348652==I[X]then I[X],x[X]=nil,nil end
